sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79399" key="parensfhno/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρεν-σφηνόομαι</orth>, <sense id="n79399.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be wedged in beside, 'impacted'</tr_>, cj. ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
